paragraphs.source: Before late 2025, GPU rental pricing was more competitive as operators had much greater GPU inventory while end demand was only starting to accelerate meaningfully. Pricing exercises were competitive, with multiple Neoclouds able to offer very competitive pricing. These operators prioritized utilization and ensuring they did not miss out on sweating fixed compute assets before the next GPU refresh cycle potentially puts pressure on pricing for incumbent GPU servers.

paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Before late 2025, GPU rental pricing was more competitive as operators had much greater GPU inventory while end demand was only starting to accelerate meaningfully. Pricing exercises were competitive, with multiple Neoclouds able to offer very competitive pricing. These operators prioritized utilization and ensuring they did not miss out on sweating fixed compute assets before the next GPU refresh cycle potentially puts pressure on pricing for incumbent GPU servers.

pro.text: 在2025年底之前，GPU租赁市场的定价竞争更为激烈。当时运营商手中握有大量GPU库存，而终端需求才刚刚开始实质性加速。报价环节竞争激烈，多家新兴算力云厂商都能开出极具竞争力的价格。这些运营商将出租率放在首位，力求在下一轮GPU更新周期可能对现有GPU服务器价格造成冲击之前，牢牢抓住机会，最大化压榨固定算力资产价值。

applied_terms: Translate 'sweating fixed compute assets' as maximizing utilization/extracting value (充分压榨固定算力资产价值).
'Tenor' in this financial/contractual context should be translated as 期限.

key_points: The market was competitive before late 2025, with operators prioritizing high utilization.
The market is structurally divided into short-term, mid-term, and long-term contract segments.
translation_notes: Translate 'sweating fixed compute assets' as maximizing utilization/extracting value (充分压榨固定算力资产价值).
'Tenor' in this financial/contractual context should be translated as 期限.

paragraphs.source: GPU rental providers’ strategy has pivoted 180 degrees since then. Neoclouds and Hyperscalers are now in the driver’s seat – they can now negotiate for more favorable terms such as higher prepay, better pricing, longer contract lengths and can even pick and choose the contract start and end dates to match their inventory availability. Time is also now on the Neoclouds’ side – they can plan deployments on their own time, harnessing the increasing price climate to build the best book of clients for a given cluster over time.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: GPU rental providers’ strategy has pivoted 180 degrees since then. Neoclouds and Hyperscalers are now in the driver’s seat – they can now negotiate for more favorable terms such as higher prepay, better pricing, longer contract lengths and can even pick and choose the contract start and end dates to match their inventory availability. Time is also now on the Neoclouds’ side – they can plan deployments on their own time, harnessing the increasing price climate to build the best book of clients for a given cluster over time.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: GPU rental providers’ strategy has pivoted 180 degrees since then. Neoclouds and Hyperscalers are now in the driver’s seat – they can now negotiate for more favorable terms such as higher prepay, better pricing, longer contract lengths and can even pick and choose the contract start and end dates to match their inventory availability. Time is also now on the Neoclouds’ side – they can plan deployments on their own time, harnessing the increasing price climate to build the best book of clients for a given cluster over time.

pro.text: 自那以后，GPU租赁供应商的策略发生了180度大转弯。如今，新兴算力云厂商与超大规模云厂商已完全掌握主动权——他们能够争取到更有利的条款，例如更高的预付款比例、更优的定价以及更长的合同期限，甚至可以根据自身的库存情况，从容挑选合同的起止日期。时间也站到了新兴算力云厂商这一边：他们能够按照自己的节奏规划部署，并利用价格不断上涨的大环境，逐步为特定算力集群构建最优的客户组合。

applied_terms: Translate 'sweating fixed compute assets' as maximizing utilization/extracting value (充分压榨固定算力资产价值).

paragraphs.source: 1. Short-term rental: On-Demand, Spot and less than 3-month contracts 2. Mid-term contracts: 3-month contracts all the way to 3-year+ contracts. 3. Long-term offtakes: 4-year to 5-year contracts, though 5-year is the most popular tenor.

pro.text: 1. 短期租赁：按需实例、竞价实例以及短于3个月的合同 2. 中期合同：从3个月一直延伸至3年以上的合同。 3. 长期包销协议：4到5年的合同，其中5年是最主流的合同期限。
